assertions.title: Nested Douyin user-search pages stay unsupported at intake

steps.expected: Intake form displayed with Douyin Link input and disabled Continue button
steps.observed: Intake form displayed with textbox 'Douyin Link' and disabled 'Continue' button

steps.action: Fill input with nested user-search URL: https://www.douyin.com/user/self/search/%E6%85%A2%E5%AD%A6ai?aid=8361ee96-5a5c-46a8-a327-6261655fc3f2&modal_id=7621978881326583092&type=general
steps.expected: URL appears in input field, Continue button becomes enabled
steps.observed: URL populated in input field, Continue button enabled

steps.action: Click Continue to submit the form
steps.expected: Page stays on intake, shows unsupported-scope error, preserves input value
steps.observed: Page remained on intake (URL: http://127.0.0.1:3100/), input value preserved, 'Unsupported Link' error displayed

steps.expected: Input still contains the nested user-search URL
steps.observed: Input value confirmed as the full nested user-search URL

steps.action: Verify unsupported-scope V1 error message is shown
steps.expected: Clear error message indicating the link is not supported
steps.observed: Heading 'Unsupported Link' with message 'This link is not supported. Please provide a Douyin creator profile or single video link.' displayed with red error icon
POST /api/intake -> 400 with body: {"success":false,"error":"This link is not supported. Please provide a Douyin creator profile or single video link.","inputType":"unsupported"}

evidence.network: POST /api/intake -> 400 {"success":false,"error":"This link is not supported. Please provide a Douyin creator profile or single video link.","inputType":"unsupported"}

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. VAL-INTAKE-007 confirmed that nested Douyin user-search URLs are correctly rejected at intake with a clear unsupported-scope error, preserved input value, and 400 API response.
